no: Allows non-evil parties with rep 14+ to travel to Lunia (the first layer of Mount Celestia). Patches OH5xxx (Olvenauk's Haven) area scripts. V1.9 (April 2026): any non-evil char with rep 14+ can start the quest (Dorn excluded), added bounty quest from Mercy Whitedove. V1.9 breaks existing translations — non-English users should use V1.3.2 until V2.0.
sum: Lunia's map is a refreshing contrast to the many hellish locales present in Baldur's Gate II.

advisories.reason: Both mods extensively patch OH5xxx area scripts (Resurrection Gorge / Olvenauk's Haven). May conflict if both installed.
